welcome.heroTitle: Find the Perfect Spot for Your Next
welcome.heroDesc: Localyze aggregates foot traffic patterns, competitor density, and real-time demand signals into one clear answer — before you sign the lease.
welcome.searchPlaceholder: Enter a city, neighborhood, or address...
welcome.dataAggDesc: Scanning 20,000+ local points of interest and real-time foot traffic signals around any address.
welcome.aiAnalysisDesc: Evaluating competitor density, market saturation, and demand signals using multi-factor intelligence models.
welcome.actionableDesc: Delivering a confident Feasibility Score and location report you can act on — instantly.
welcome.capabilitiesTitle: Everything you need to choose right.
welcome.capabilitiesDesc: Three powerful lenses on any location — unified in one seamless analysis flow.
welcome.footTrafficDesc: Visualize pedestrian and vehicle flow patterns throughout the day and week — pinpoint peak visibility before you commit.
welcome.competitorDensityDesc: Map nearby competitors, understand their clustering, and gauge potential market pressure at any address you're evaluating.
welcome.marketSaturationDesc: Discover oversaturated zones and untapped pockets with our saturation index — move where others haven't looked yet.
welcome.insightDesc: Location analytics that used to cost thousands — now at your fingertips.
welcome.aboutDesc: A platform born from the belief that every entrepreneur deserves enterprise-grade location intelligence.
welcome.missionTitle: Making smart location decisions accessible to every business owner.
welcome.missionDesc: Choosing where to open a business is one of the most consequential decisions an entrepreneur can make. Localyze was built to level the playing field — aggregating foot traffic patterns, competitor density, and real-time demand signals into a single intuitive platform so that independent business owners can make the same caliber of location decisions that enterprise retailers have relied on for decades.
welcome.gradDesc: Localyze was developed as a capstone graduation project in the Computer Information Systems program. It demonstrates the integration of geospatial data processing, modern web technologies, and business intelligence design to solve real-world entrepreneurial challenges.
welcome.nextGreatLocation: Your next great location is waiting to be found.
welcome.runFirstScan: Run your first scan in minutes. No setup required.
welcome.footerTagline: Location intelligence for entrepreneurs who move fast and think smart.
welcome.fullFooter: © {{year}} Localyze · Final-year CIS graduation project · All data is illustrative.

results.emptyState: Select a business type, drop a pin on the map, and run analysis
results.feasibilityTooltipDesc: Composite viability index based on competitor density, population, and market saturation. A score above 75 indicates strong opportunity; below 55 suggests caution.
results.competitorTooltip: The total number of same-type businesses found within your search radius. Lower count = less competition = higher opportunity.
results.saturationTooltipDesc: Measures how crowded the market is relative to population. Based on competitor density per km². Below 30% is low risk; above 70% signals a saturated market.

steps.title: Welcome to Localyze!
steps.body: Localyze helps you analyze market viability for any business location in Amman. This quick tour will show you everything you need to get started.

steps.title: Navigate the App
steps.body: Use the sidebar on the left to move between sections: Dashboard for your overview, Scan to analyze locations, Reports to review saved scans, and Appendix for methodology details.

steps.title: Run a Market Scan
steps.body: In the Scan page, choose a business type and search radius, then click anywhere on the map to drop your pin. Hit "Run Analysis" to get your market report instantly.

steps.title: Read Your Results
steps.body: After scanning you'll see three key metrics: Feasibility Score (overall viability), Competitor Density (how many rivals are nearby), and Market Saturation (how crowded the market is).

steps.title: Get AI-Powered Insights
steps.body: Click "Get AI Suggestions" to generate a strategic analysis powered by Gemini AI — covering market risks, growth opportunities, and differentiation strategies tailored to your scan.

steps.title: Save & Track Reports
steps.body: Click "Save Report" in the scan panel after any analysis. All saved reports appear on your Dashboard and Reports page so you can compare locations over time.

appendix.title: Appendix & Methodology
appendix.subtitle: Definitions for every metric shown in Localyze, and an explanation of how each score is calculated from real data. Click any term to expand its full explanation.

scanSteps.title: Drop a pin & choose a business type
scanSteps.desc: You select a location on the map in Amman, a business type (e.g. café, gym, pharmacy), an optional sub-type (e.g. Specialty Coffee, Women-only gym), and a scan radius between 300 m and 5 km.

scanSteps.title: Competitor discovery via Google Places
scanSteps.desc: The backend queries Google Places Nearby Search within your radius and place type. For restaurants and cafés, results are cross-referenced against a Talabat restaurant database using fuzzy name matching (≥85% confidence) to filter by cuisine — so a search for "Sushi" only counts actual sushi venues, not generic restaurants.

scanSteps.title: District demographics lookup
scanSteps.desc: Your coordinates are matched to one of Amman's sub-districts using bounding-box geometry (falling back to nearest centroid). Each district carries census data: total population, youth (ages 15–34), elderly (60+), and male/female breakdown.

scanSteps.title: Education proximity check
scanSteps.desc: For food and beverage business types (café, restaurant, fast food, bakery), the system searches for universities within 1 km and validates them against a whitelist of known Jordanian universities — filtering out false positives like cafeteria entrances or parking lots near campuses.

scanSteps.title: Feasibility score computation
scanSteps.desc: All collected data is fed into a scoring algorithm (logistic curve + adjustments) and returned alongside raw competitor data, demographic stats, and rating summaries.

scanSteps.title: AI insights (optional)
scanSteps.desc: The full scan result is sent to Gemini 2.5 Flash with a structured business-consultant prompt. It returns a plain-language summary, key risks, and differentiation suggestions — all grounded in the actual competitor names and numbers from your scan.

appendix.feasibilityFormula: base = 100 / (1 + e^(-x))   where x = (ln(pop / comp) − ln(2000)) / 2
appendix.feasibilityDesc: The headline viability index for opening your chosen business at the selected location. It starts from a logistic (S-curve) function of the population-to-competitor ratio — specifically, how many people exist per competing business relative to a baseline of 2,000 people/competitor.
appendix.ratingQuality: Competitor rating quality: For every 0.1 stars below 4.0, the score increases by 1.5 points. Low-rated competitors signal a gap you can fill.
